commit.message:
Fix game hang by correcting CPU branch timing

Branch taken (+1) and page-crossing (+2) cycle penalties were lost because
branch() incremented this.cycles but execute() overwrote it with the base
cost. Use a branchPenalty field that gets added after execute() returns.
Also remove temporary debug instrumentation from PPU and NesEmulator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add component diagram in draw.io format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game hang after screensaver by delivering APU frame counter IRQs to CPU

The APU's isIrqPending() was never checked in the main loop, so games
relying on APU IRQs for timing (e.g. Double Dragon & Battletoads) would
spin indefinitely waiting for an interrupt that never fired.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add APU implementation for sound support

Implement NES Audio Processing Unit with pulse, triangle, and noise
channels, wired into the CPU bus and main emulation loop. Audio output
uses javax.sound.sampled at 44100 Hz.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game freeze after title screen by adding NMI edge detection, PRG RAM, and DMA NMI handling

- Trigger NMI immediately when game enables NMI via PPUCTRL while VBlank is active
- Add 8KB PRG RAM at $6000-$7FFF so game state reads/writes work correctly
- Check for NMI during DMA transfer to avoid missing VBlank interrupts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add README with architecture overview, setup, and API docs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement notification system with server cluster, workers, emulators, and load testing

- Notification server: REST API, input validation, template rendering, Redis caching, RabbitMQ routing
- Notification worker: 4 dedicated queue consumers (APNS/FCM/SMS/EMAIL) with retry logic
- Third-party emulator: simulates delivery services with 95% success rate
- Device emulator: receives notifications, WebSocket broadcast, REST stats
- Load client: seeds test data, multi-threaded load test with p95/p99 reporting
- Infrastructure: PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Prometheus, Grafana with pre-provisioned dashboard
- Docker Compose with service health checks and replicas
- 27 unit tests covering validation, services, controllers, consumers
- Component diagram in drawio format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Both /admin/mensajes and /admin/contacto now have a red "Eliminar"
button with JS confirmation. FK CASCADE handles related records.

commit.message:
Add IPC event stream (subscribe command)

Clients can now subscribe to real-time compositor events via
'dinatorctl subscribe', which streams JSON lines for:
- window-opened (with app_id and title)
- window-closed
- window-focused
- resolution-changed

The Subscribe command switches the IPC connection to streaming mode.
Events are broadcast from DinatorState via an EventBroadcaster
(Vec<mpsc::Sender> behind a Mutex), with dead subscribers pruned
automatically on each emit.

commit.message:
Complete security hardening: CSP everywhere, referrer policy, user enumeration fix

- Add Content-Security-Policy meta to every HTML file (16 files now covered):
  public pages: base-uri/form-action/object-src/upgrade-insecure-requests
  employer pages: full allowlist (default-src none, restricted script/connect/img/font)
  privacy/terms/checkout: tight default-src none with only unsafe-inline styles
  404: restricted self-only script and style sources
- Add object-src 'none' to all CSPs — blocks Flash and plugin injection
- Add upgrade-insecure-requests to all CSPs — forces HTTPS subresources
- Add referrer meta (strict-origin-when-cross-origin) to all employer portal pages,
  privacy.html, and terms.html
- Fix user enumeration in employer login: generic error message no longer reveals
  whether an email address is registered (previously: "not linked to an employer")
- shared.css verified clean — no external @import sources

commit.message:
Live Mode: use CSS scale() for true vanishing-point depth

Replace per-element font-size changes with transform: scale() on entire
rows with transformOrigin: center. This makes numbers, gaps, padding,
and text all shrink proportionally toward center, creating a real 3D
perspective effect. Rows also compress vertically as they recede.
Stronger opacity cascade (0.8 × 0.6^i) and bottom fade gradient.

commit.message:
fix(lidarr): remove disc image download penalty

Now that the NZBGet post-processing extension automatically splits
FLAC+CUE disc images, there is no reason to penalise them. Set score
to 0 (neutral) on both quality profiles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: 加入客戶端日期過濾，排除超出時間範圍的新聞

Google News RSS 的 when:Xd 參數並非嚴格篩選，可能回傳舊文章。
新增 is_within_date_range() 函式在抓取後驗證日期，丟棄超出範圍的結果。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: correct lesson loading screen — error screen was unreachable

Two bugs caused the lesson to stay stuck on "Gerando sua lição…":

1. Render order: hookError screen was placed AFTER the loading screen
   check (phase === 'idle'), so it was dead code — the loading spinner
   always rendered first even when hookError was true.

2. Missing try-catch on bootstrap IIFE: if the browser blocked the
   server action call (net::ERR_BLOCKED_BY_CLIENT), generateHook threw
   client-side before reaching its own try-catch, causing an unhandled
   rejection that left isLoading=true forever.

Fixes: move hookError check before loading check; wrap IIFE in
try-catch so any network error triggers the error screen + retry button.
